subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Lists all projects in a solution file

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Adds one or more projects to the solution file

args.name: path
args.description: The path to the project or projects to add to the solution. Unix/Linux shell globbing pattern expansions are processed correctly by the dotnet sln command

options.name: --in-root
options.description: Places the projects in the root of the solution, rather than creating a solution folder. Can't be used with -s|--solution-folder. Available since .NET Core 3.0 SDK

name: -s
--solution-folder
options.description: The destination solution folder path to add the projects to. Can't be used with --in-root. Available since .NET Core 3.0 SDK

args.name: path
args.description: The destination solution folder path to add the projects to. Can't be used with --in-root. Available since .NET Core 3.0 SDK

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Removes a project or multiple projects from the solution file

args.name: path
args.description: The path to the project or projects to add to the solution. Unix/Linux shell globbing pattern expansions are processed correctly by the dotnet sln command
